description: You are a frontend developer tasked with prototyping style changes for a client on https://www.example.com. Apply the following CSS changes to the live page: set the page body background color to AliceBlue (#f0f8ff); set the main heading (h1) color to DarkBlue (#00008b), text alignment to center, and text decoration to underline; set paragraphs (p) font family to monospace; and set links (a) background color to Magenta (#ff00ff) with white text (#ffffff). Save a screenshot of the modified page to /home/ga/Desktop/mockup.png and save the applied CSS rules to /home/ga/Desktop/new_styles.css.
